hypothesis: Enhancing SSTR2 selectivity by introducing aromatic and hydrophobic substitutions at positions 5 and 11 will improve complementarity with SSTR2-specific ECL2/TM5/TM6 regions while reducing off-target affinity.

critic_feedback_used.hypothesis: The current hypothesis remains valid: strong SSTR2 binding can be achieved, but structural and docking quality must be improved to ensure functional candidates.

proposed_changes.rationale: Increase the number of candidates to improve the chances of generating structurally valid designs that pass the pLDDT and docking filters.
Tighten the clash filter to reduce structural failures due to steric clashes, which are likely contributing to the poor pLDDT and docking scores.
